cases.title: Every documented paginated list endpoint returns total in response envelope
preconditions: Seeded data covering all eight paginated endpoints: GET /events, GET /events/{eventId}/registrations, waitlist, attendance, eligibility, audit-logs, status-history, and GET /me/registrations
Valid JWT tokens for participant and organizer actors with required scopes
steps: Issue paginated GET requests to each endpoint with page=1 and endpoint default pageSize
Assert each response body includes items (array), page, pageSize, total (integer), and totalPages
cases.expected: All eight paginated endpoints return the envelope shape from API design section 3 with a present total field; no bare array responses; satisfies FR-31 total count metadata on every paginated list response

cases.title: total reflects full matching row count before paging not current page length
preconditions: Event with exactly 25 registrations
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: Compare total to items.length on each page
cases.expected: Page 1 has items.length=20 and total=25; page 2 has items.length=5 and total=25; total equals full matching row count per API design total definition and testing plan paginated list queries integration target

cases.title: Events list total reflects search and state filter scope before paging
preconditions: Mixed event catalog with searchable names and varied states
At least 13 RegistrationOpen events matching q=workshop plus additional non-matching events
Authenticated participant or actor with list visibility
steps: Compare filtered total to unfiltered total and to manually counted matching rows
cases.expected: Filtered response total equals count of events matching both q and state filters only; total is less than or equal to unfiltered total; totalPages=ceil(filtered total/pageSize); FR-31 total metadata scoped to applied filters

cases.title: Registrations list total reflects optional state filter
preconditions: Event with registrations in Registered, Waitlisted, and Cancelled states
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: Count Registered rows in database for the event
cases.expected: State-filtered total equals count of registrations with state=Registered only; unfiltered total equals all registration rows for the event; satisfies FR-31 total on organizer operational registrations list per API design optional state filter

cases.title: My registrations total scoped to current actor only
preconditions: Participant A with 3 registrations across events
Participant B with 5 registrations across events
Authenticated JWT for Participant A
steps: Independently count Participant A registration rows
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with total=3 matching Participant A rows only; total does not include Participant B registrations; FR-31 total on participant own registrations list per GET /me/registrations contract

cases.title: Status history list total reflects all transitions for event scope
preconditions: Event with multiple registration status change records
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: Count status history rows for the event in persistence layer
cases.expected: Response total equals full status history row count for the event before paging; supports FR-23 traceability and FR-31 total on operational status history list per testing plan status history retrieval scenario

cases.title: Eligibility list total reflects optional eligibility filter
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated Eligible and NotEligible participants
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: Unfiltered total equals all evaluated eligibility rows; Eligible filter total equals Eligible row count only; FR-31 total metadata respects eligibility filter on organizer eligibility operational list

cases.title: total remains identical across sequential page requests for same query
preconditions: Paginated list endpoint with at least three pages of data at pageSize=10
Authenticated actor with list access
steps: GET page=1, page=2, and page=3 with pageSize=10 on the same endpoint and filters
cases.expected: total is identical on every page response; only items array differs between pages; enables reliable client pagination controls per FR-31 and AC-13

cases.title: Beyond-last-page request returns unchanged total with empty items
preconditions: Paginated list endpoint with known total row count (e.g. GET /events with total <= 12)
Valid authentication where required
steps: GET list endpoint with page=1 and pageSize=20; record total and totalPages
GET same endpoint with page=totalPages+1 and same pageSize
cases.expected: Beyond-last-page response has items: [], page equals requested page, total and totalPages match page-1 metadata; FR-31 total still returned on empty page per API design section 3

cases.title: Empty matching result set returns total zero with valid envelope
preconditions: Event with no registrations
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items: [], total=0, totalPages=1 (or consistent zero-total convention), page=1, pageSize=20; FR-31 total count present even when no rows match

cases.title: total unchanged when pageSize varies for same filter query
preconditions: Event with 30 registrations
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: total=30 on all three responses; only totalPages and items.length differ; total is independent of pageSize per FR-31 matching-rows-before-paging semantics

cases.title: total increases after new registration added between list requests
preconditions: Event with 10 existing registrations and available capacity
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin for list queries
Separate participant available to register
steps: Participant registers for the event successfully
cases.expected: Second response total equals first total plus one; total reflects current matching row count after data mutation; FR-31 total is authoritative for organizer operational list freshness

cases.title: Pagination envelope computes totalPages as ceil(total divided by pageSize)
preconditions: Pure function or mapper that builds paginated response envelope from items, page, pageSize, and total
cases.expected: totalPages=1 when total=0; totalPages=2 when total=25; totalPages=2 when total=40; total echoed unchanged in envelope per API design totalPages formula and FR-31

cases.title: Large result set returns accurate total without loading all rows into response body
preconditions: Database seeded with more than 500 rows for a paginated endpoint (e.g. audit-logs or registrations)
OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
Test environment uses deterministic fixtures per testing plan section 7
steps: GET paginated list with page=1 and pageSize=20
Verify response body size and total field against known seeded row count
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items.length <= pageSize; total equals full seeded matching row count (>500); response completes within acceptable latency per NFR-16; FR-31 total metadata returned via efficient count query not full row materialization

cases.title: Event overview registration count aligns with registrations list total metadata
preconditions: Event with known registration count across states
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: Compare overview registration count to list total
cases.expected: Dashboard or overview registration count equals registrations list total metadata; operational summary and paginated list share authoritative count per FR-22 and FR-31 consistency

cases.title: Paginated list response mapper always includes non-negative integer total
preconditions: Unit test harness for pagination envelope builder or list response mapper
steps: Map query result with zero rows, page=1, pageSize=20
Map query result with partial page, page=2, pageSize=10, total=25
Assert total field type and presence on each mapped envelope
cases.expected: Every mapped envelope includes total as a non-negative integer; total is never omitted or conflated with items.length; satisfies FR-31 at mapper layer before HTTP serialization
